since_last: 46% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.92%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 46% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.14% · BTC +1.20% · Gold -0.37% · Nasdaq100 -0.04%. 46% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.92%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.92%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +15.20%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +15.20%, META +6.45%, NVDA +2.94%, UEC +2.46%, NXE +2.00%. Laggards: RXRX -6.91%, S -5.14%, ZS -4.92%, CRWD -4.91%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.36% at $148.57
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.36% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
